Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/FAQs.asp

# Funding Readiness Route to SBDC

## Reusable BOSS response pattern
SBDC does not lend money, but it can help determine financing needs, evaluate readiness, and prepare business-plan and loan-application documentation. Route users here when they ask for loans, SBA loans, projections, or lender-readiness help.

## Handoff fields to capture
- Stage
- Business idea/current business
- Location ZIP/county
- Primary decision
- What has been done
- Revenue/customer evidence
- Documents available
- Special eligibility or language preference
- Recommended resource and why
